title: Following the Height: Validate cut depth accuracy
body: Not sure if the cut depth was accurate - need a proper process to validate each point.  **Assigned To:** Carlee **Priority:** Critical **Status:** In Progress

title: Following the Height: Create a mold for playdough with a wavy surface
body: Create a mold for playdough with a wavy surface for testing height-following accuracy.  **Assigned To:** Carlee **Priority:** Critical **Status:** Done

title: Following the Height: Add the 3D surface tool to Katana
body: Add the 3D surface tool Dilina created to Katana.  **Assigned To:** Dilina **Priority:** Critical **Status:** Done

title: Following the Height: 3D surface tool should be completely off when engineering signs off
body: 3D surface tool should be completely off when engineering signs off.  **Assigned To:** Dilina **Priority:** Critical **Status:** Done

title: User Actions History: Remove null records (bug)
body: Remove the null records - bug on the User Actions History page.  **Priority:** High **Status:** Not Started

title: User Actions History: Fix scrolling and pagination
body: Scrolling and pagination both exist on this page but need to be fixed.  **Priority:** High **Status:** Not Started

title: User Actions History: Condense data - too much white space
body: Data isn't condensed enough to see all records at once. Too much white space; UI can be optimized to show more details.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: System Settings: Horizontal scroll isn't working - columns can't be seen
body: Horizontal scroll isn't working, so all the columns can't be seen on the System Settings page.  **Priority:** High **Status:** Not Started

title: Calibration Offset: Remove Set Parameter from the Maintenance page
body: Remove 'Set Parameter' from the Maintenance page.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Calibration Offset: Add increment fields
body: Add increment fields to the Calibration Offset page.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Calibration Offset: Draw direction arrows for X, Y, Z axes
body: Draw a right hand showing arrows for the direction of travel and X, Y, Z axes on the Calibration Offset page.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Calibration Offset: Gray out Min Y and Max Y when locked
body: Gray out Min Y and Max Y when they're locked.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Language: Switching back to English doesn't work properly
body: Switching the language back to English doesn't work properly; not all words on the UI have been updated to reflect the language change.  **Priority:** High **Status:** Not Started

title: Recipe Assistant BUG: Loading drag blade recipe then returning to Home changes settings to waterjet
body: BUG: When loading a recipe with drag blade, going to Recipe Assistant, and going back to Home, the system settings seem to change entirely to a waterjet recipe.  **Priority:** High **Status:** Not Started

title: Control the Line Settings: Use OPC to create dynamic settings in Katana
body: Use OPC to create dynamic settings in Katana so the line settings can be controlled from the UI.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Control the Line Settings: Save all PLC values into the Katana Recipe
body: All values in the PLC should be saved into the Katana Recipe; when the recipe is changed all machines should get the latest values.  **Priority:** Low **Status:** Not Started

title: Robot Card Status: Change robot card color to reflect status
body: Change the robot card color entirely to reflect its status.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Robot Card Status: Make robot status clearer on the card
body: Make the robot status clearer - add a border, enlarge the left sidebar, or move the robot number to the top of the card and have the colored top bar show status.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Startup: Katana always shows running while starting up - creates confusion
body: Katana currently starts cameras first, then robots. While starting up, Katana always shows 'running' - this creates confusion.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Startup: Each robot should clearly display its state
body: Each robot should clearly display its state: starting, running, stuck in dip and clean, or stopped.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Add limits to all fields
body: Add limits to all fields across the UI.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Remove scrollbars by adding pages
body: Remove scrollbars by adding pages - KS has already added some for this.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Change image preview card background or use dynamic layout
body: Change the image preview card background color or use a dynamic layout depending on image size.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Standardize alarms and alerts across the UI
body: Standardize alarms and alerts across the UI.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Rename surface to product
body: Rename 'surface' to 'product' throughout the UI.  **Assigned To:** Ashiqul **Priority:** Medium **Status:** In Progress

title: General UI/UX: Katana launcher and Katana icon look too similar
body: The Katana launcher and Katana icon look too similar, causing confusion. While Katana is launching, backup/restore should be available from the launcher; once Katana is open, backup/restore should only be available within Katana.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Add units to all settings
body: Add units to all settings across the UI.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Pretzel tab should only appear when enabled
body: The Pretzel tab should only appear when it's enabled; there should be other settings similar to that.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Spell out abbreviated setting names in full
body: Spell out abbreviated setting names in full (e.g., 'Approach H' instead of a shortened version).  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Increment buttons should support press-and-hold
body: Increment buttons should support press-and-hold for the '+' button.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Hide the maximize icon in webview
body: Hide the maximize icon in webview.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Unsaved Changes button should show popup with breakdown
body: When the 'Unsaved Changes' button in the top nav is pressed, show a popup with a breakdown of the changes, and let the user save directly from that popup.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Make tool selection consistent between Recipe Assistant and home screen
body: Tool selection in the Recipe Assistant differs from tool selection on the home screen - make them consistent.  **Assigned To:** Ashiqul **Priority:** Medium **Status:** In Progress

title: General UI/UX: Reorganize Recipe Assistant - move Advanced Settings to the end
body: Reorganize the Recipe Assistant; move the 'Advanced Settings' button to the end.  **Assigned To:** Ashiqul **Priority:** Medium **Status:** In Progress

title: General UI/UX: Hide height checks and buttons based on XML settings
body: Hide height checks and other buttons based on XML settings, similar to WPF.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Tool changing should appear under Maintenance - Robot
body: Tool changing should also appear under Maintenance -> Robot.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Add 6 ultrasonic generator pages
body: Add 6 ultrasonic generator pages to control individual generator settings.  **Priority:** High **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Add and bind all ultrasonic settings from K1.5
body: Add and bind all ultrasonic settings from K1.5.  **Priority:** High **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Minimize number of clicks required
body: Minimize the number of clicks required - e.g., changing something on one of the robots takes multiple clicks.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Camera page - add Restart Cameras button, remove Start/Stop
body: Camera page: add a 'Restart Cameras' button; remove Start/Stop.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Add and default to dip and clean cycles
body: Add and default to dip and clean cycles.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Logs - remove debug logs, show only alarms
body: Logs: remove all debug logs, show only alarms.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Keep documentation up to date and add search
body: Keep documentation up to date and add search functionality.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: Remove minimum password requirements
body: Remove minimum password requirements for user accounts so passwords can be any length.  **Priority:** High **Status:** Not Started

title: General UI/UX: For ID tags - PLC sends full database on user login
body: For ID tags: the PLC will send the full database. When a user logs in, it will populate the username and password hash code.  **Priority:** High **Status:** Not Started

title: User Management: Add a pinned settings tab for clarity
body: Clean up by adding a pinned settings tab/section so users can understand settings more easily instead of having all system settings on one page. Hide unwanted settings if possible.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: User Management: Export all settings and actions to CSV/Excel
body: Export all settings and actions into a CSV/Excel file - Carlee, JM, and Khurram will decide what to keep and what to hide.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Custom Cut Mode: Add multi-line selection
body: Add multi-line selection in Custom Cut Mode.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Custom Cut Mode: Not touch-friendly - optimize for touch
body: Custom Cut Mode is not touch-friendly; optimize for touch.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Custom Cut Mode: Lock/hide normal parameters when enabled; indicate custom cut in recipe
body: When Custom Cut Mode is enabled, all normal parameters should be locked/hidden, and the current recipe should indicate that it is a custom cut.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Settings Menu: Hide ABI menu items
body: Hide ABI menu items from the Settings Menu.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Settings Menu: Reorganize and rename items
body: Reorganize and rename Settings Menu items for better clarity.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Engineering Settings: Remove FGF from everywhere
body: Remove FGF from everywhere in the UI and codebase.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Engineering Settings: Move cut ordering to recipe panel and add guidance with GIFs
body: Move cut ordering to the recipe panel and assistant, or into an advanced settings section; add more guidance on this, including GIFs.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Engineering Settings: Show global/local status per setting in cut ordering
body: Show global/local status for each setting in cut ordering (or everywhere). In Super Admin mode, users should be able to click the icon to toggle each setting between global and local.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Engineering Settings: Hide tool min Y separation from non-Super Admin users
body: Tool settings: hide 'tool min Y separation' - only show it to Super Admin.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

title: Engineering Settings: Replace host with commit number in version info
body: Version info: replace 'host' with commit number.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

body: Popup z-index is too high relative to the layer panel on the Home Preview page.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

body: Keep all assignments and other elements visible at all times in the layers, but default-select only the bounding boxes.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

body: Fix the layout of the Encoder Calibration page.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

body: Remove the Save button; repurpose it to show customers how to calculate belt stretch instead.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

body: Make Encoder Calibration visible to customers; add more instructions/guides to make it more user friendly.  **Priority:** Medium **Status:** Not Started

body: Test the Bakeoff IPC installation and validate communication.  **Priority:** High **Status:** Not Started

body: Robot information: show which tool is being held, and whether the tool is locked or unlocked.

body: Remove the text highlight from web view.

body: When custom cut mode is enabled, it doesn't show anywhere in the UI.

body: Add instructions/guides for each parameter.

body: Robot assignment alignment is off.
